# மலை நாடு (Malai Naadu)

> Malaysia's leading Tamil news portal — latest news in Tamil covering politics, sports, entertainment, business, national and international affairs, curated from trusted Malaysian sources.

Malai Naadu (மலை நாடு) aggregates and translates news from major Malaysian outlets into Tamil for the Malaysian Tamil community. Content is updated continuously throughout the day.

## Pages

- [Utama / Home](/): Latest headlines and featured stories
- [Terkini / Latest](/terkini): All articles in chronological order
- [Trending](/trending): Most-read articles right now
- [Kategori / Categories](/kategori): Browse by topic
- [Cari / Search](/cari): Search across all articles
- [Tentang / About](/tentang): About Malai Naadu

## Optional

- [Privasi / Privacy Policy](/privasi)
- [Terma / Terms of Service](/terma)
